description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a wooden fence and lush green trees, featuring a combination of flat and sloped dark roofs. The structure has a prominent two-car garage at the front, large glass doors, and a mix of rectangular and square windows distributed asymmetrically across the facades. The exterior walls are finished in light gray, with a darker accent on the garage and roof. A landscaped garden with blue flowers lines the front walkway, and the backyard is enclosed by trees for privacy. The building appears to have two stories, with a rooftop terrace visible on the upper level.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with flat and sloped roofs, light gray walls, a two-car garage, and lush landscaping within a fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two-car garage, main entrance, landscaped walkway, and a mix of flat and sloped roofs.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the upper story, rooftop terrace, and dense tree coverage along the fence.
description_view_2: Back view with a clear view of the rear facade, multiple windows, and trees lining the backyard.
description_view_3: Side view showing the driveway, garage, and a long stretch of trees along the fence.
attribute_roof_type: combination of flat and shed roofs
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and scattered windows
